articles.title: They Might Be Giants bring humor, horns, and plenty of heart to House of Blues
articles.description:
The duo treated Boston to two marathon sets and a double encore to kick off a two-night run at the Lansdowne venue.

The post They Might Be Giants bring humor, horns, and plenty of heart to House of Blues appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: They Might Be Giants performed two marathon sets at House of Blues on June 6.
The concert featured a double encore, enhancing the experience for Boston fans.
This event marks the start of a two-night run, boosting local nightlife.
